title: Vanilla Industrialization
description: This mod aims to add new blocks to process and break down items into functional and needed items!
body:
Vanilla Industrialization adds many new blocks, items, resources, and weapons.

Everything in this mod is suppose to enhance the vanilla experience through blocks that semi automate certain processes or do things faster such as ore duplication through some processes.

Some of the things I can list here

- Steel blocks, tools, and armor (oxidizes)

- Copper tools and armor (oxidizes)

- Spears, revolvers, and revolver carbines, grenades (not too game breaking and very expensive to craft)

- Pulverizer which breaks down raw ores into two dust, breaks down stone --> cobblestone --> gravel --> flint --> sand dust (4 flint crafts gravel, 4 sand dust crafts sand)

- & much more in the future!

V Preview image! V

![image of most of the things in the update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59789b7b112016d7e75b60b359b4f8bab3c6f41.png)

Current bugs/issues - Unsure about any other bugs or issues there is probably some.
